name: Secure Deletion with SDelete
description: Detection of secure file deletion using `sdelete.exe` or similar tools. Attackers often use secure deletion utilities to remove traces of their activity, making forensic analysis more difficult. This prompt helps investigate the use of such tools, which could indicate an attempt at defense evasion or cover up a compromise.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}` where `sdelete.exe` or a similar secure deletion tool was executed. The process `{process_name}` with Process ID `{process_id}` executed the command `{command_line}`. Analyze the target files or directories (`{target_object}`) that were subjected to secure deletion. Review the user (`{user}`) associated with this activity. Determine if this is a legitimate administrative action (e.g., data sanitization) or a potential malicious attempt to cover tracks. Provide a summary of your findings and suggest immediate mitigation steps.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the event was detected.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that performed the secure deletion (e.g., sdelete.exe).

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process that performed the secure deletion.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the process that performed the secure deletion.

parameters.name: target_object
parameters.description: The files or directories that were securely deleted.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
